default.heading: A Different Kind of University Experience
default.body: For over a century, Regent's has brought together students from around the world in an environment defined by proximity, perspective and possibility.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2C8.13 2 5 5.13 5 9c0 5.25 7 13 7 13s7-7.75 7-13c0-3.87-3.13-7-7-7z'/><circle cx='12' cy='9' r='2.5'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Learn in the Heart of London
tiles.body: Study in Regent's Park, one of London's most beautiful campuses, surrounded by global culture, business and creative industries.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2'/><circle cx='9' cy='7' r='4'/><path d='M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87'/><path d='M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Small Classes. Global Minds.
tiles.body: Our intimate seminars bring together students from over 140 nationalities, creating discussions that go far beyond the classroom.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='2' y='3' width='20' height='14' rx='2' ry='2'/><line x1='2' y1='20' x2='22' y2='20'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Career-Ready from Day One
tiles.body: Industry projects, internships and global partnerships ensure your degree leads directly to opportunity from the moment you arrive.

two-tiles.heading: What Drives Our Community
two-tiles.body: At Regent's, we're guided by principles that shape everything we do.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><line x1='2' y1='12' x2='22' y2='12'/><path d='M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Global Perspective
tiles.body: We embrace diverse viewpoints and foster cross-cultural understanding across all we do.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2v20M2 12h20'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Inclusive Excellence
tiles.body: We create welcoming environments where every student can thrive and reach their full potential.

four-tiles.heading: Your Success is Our Priority
four-tiles.body: We provide comprehensive support across every aspect of your university journey.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2v20M2 12h20'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Academic Support
tiles.body: Expert tutoring, study skills workshops, and personalised learning strategies.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='2' y='3' width='20' height='14' rx='2'/><line x1='2' y1='20' x2='22' y2='20'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Career Services
tiles.body: Job placement support, industry networking, and professional development guidance.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2'/><circle cx='9' cy='7' r='4'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Wellbeing Support
tiles.body: Counselling services, health support, and mental health resources.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='2' width='18' height='20' rx='2'/><line x1='9' y1='2' x2='9' y2='22'/><line x1='15' y1='2' x2='15' y2='22'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Campus Life
tiles.body: Societies, sports clubs, cultural events, and recreational facilities.

five-tiles.heading: Multiple Routes to Success
five-tiles.body: Choose the study format that best fits your goals and lifestyle.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20'/><path d='M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Full-Time Study
tiles.body: Immersive on-campus experience with full access to facilities.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='1'/><circle cx='19' cy='12' r='1'/><circle cx='5' cy='12' r='1'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Part-Time Study
tiles.body: Balance your studies with work or other commitments.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='2' y='3' width='20' height='14' rx='2'/><line x1='2' y1='20' x2='22' y2='20'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Online Learning
tiles.body: Study remotely with flexible scheduling and interactive sessions.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M6 9l12 0M6 15l12 0M6 3l12 0M6 21l12 0'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Blended Learning
tiles.body: Combine on-campus and online elements for optimal flexibility.

tiles.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2L2 7v10c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V7l-10-5z'/></svg>
tiles.heading: Executive Education
tiles.body: Intensive programmes designed for working professionals.
